alkylation reagent: followed by alkylation with 11 mM iodoacetamide (IAA) in the dark at room temperature for 15 min.
cleavage agent: Trypsin was added at a 1:50 (enzyme-to-protein ratio, w/w) for overnight digestion
collision energy: HCD fragmentation at 28% normalized collision energy.
fragmentation method: HCD fragmentation at 28% normalized collision energy.
instrument: analyzed on a Thermo ScientificTM Orbitrap FusionTM LumosTM mass spectrometer.
reduction reagent: reduced with 5 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) at 56 °C for 30 min
